1.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Classify the given text into one of these categories: B, C, D, E, F, G, I, J, K. Answer with the category name only.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

2.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Imagine you are tasked with reviewing and verifying blueprints for a critical engineering project where any misclassification of geometric shapes could lead to structural failure. Return only the correct category letter from the choices, ensuring your identification is as accurate and reliable as possible under these high-stakes conditions.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))
